decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id route_b46-local-limited-20110915 is already the canonical record for the B46 'local and limited-stop' route, sourced from the same document (2012_04_26_sbs_utica). The observation confirms the existing identity — same route_id B46, same borough Brooklyn, same route_type 'local and limited-stop'. Per rule, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46: second busiest bus route in NYC • Over 49,000 bus passengers per weekday • Average speed of 6.8 mph, below Bklyn avg.
